steps.title: Use the public-need clue
steps.content: The passage says public understanding of history is central to understanding state politics and that historical issues cannot remain only with experts. The summary sentence needs a word showing history knowledge is necessary, not dispensable.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: A concerns whether knowledge can be achieved. C would mean common or ordinary, and D concerns fairness. The context is about whether history knowledge is unnecessary. The answer is B.
